# Luce Healing

> Energy healing, grief support, and space clearing by Christina Workman — Certified Reiki Master with 20+ years of experience and Ordained Minister in Marina del Rey, CA.

## Philosophy

"I don't heal you — I teach you to heal yourself." Christina Workman moves energy, clears blockages, and gives you the tools to continue healing on your own. No dependency — empowerment.

## Services

### Personal Energy Healing Sessions
- Deep relaxation, stress relief, clarity, and grounding
- Session length: 15–120 minutes
- Formats: Distance (video/phone) or in-person in Marina del Rey, CA
- For anyone seeking calm, clarity, or renewal

### End-of-Life & Grief Support
- Spiritual and energetic companionship for people facing death, caregivers, loved ones, and those grieving
- Non-denominational, trauma-informed approach
- Session length: 15–120 minutes
- Formats: Distance, in-person, or in-home

### Space & Land Clearing
- Energetic assessment, clearing, and blessing for homes, rooms, and properties
- Ideal after conflict, illness, death, or for new beginnings
- Los Angeles area

### Birth Chart Readings
- Written chart report ($75)
- Chart + 30-min reading ($125)
- Chart + 60-min deep dive ($175)
- Detailed interpretation of planetary positions, personality, relationships, career, and spiritual path

## About Christina Workman

- Certified Reiki Master with over 20 years of experience
- Ordained Non-Denominational Minister
- End-of-Life Companion
- Space and Land Clearer
- Works with all spiritual traditions and beliefs

## Pricing

- Energy Healing: Starting at $45 (15-min session) up to $630 (6-session package)
- Birth Chart Reports: $75–$175
- Space Clearing: Custom pricing

- Esme & Jade: https://esmeandjade.com — Handmade healing crystal jewelry
- Christina Workman Pottery: https://christinaworkmanpottery.com — Handmade ceramics
- The Potter's Mud Room: https://thepottersmudroom.com — Pottery tracking app
